questions.question: Who is Onur Hüseyin Koçak?
questions.answer: Onur Hüseyin Koçak is a Bangkok-based AI & UGC creator (TikTok @honored.ai) who makes performance-driven short-form video in fluent English and Turkish for AI companies, SaaS products, mobile apps, tech startups and travel brands. He works with brands worldwide.

questions.question: Where can a SaaS, AI or app brand find UGC creators who understand software?
questions.answer: Brands should look for creators with software, app, AI tool or developer-product examples, not only general lifestyle UGC. Onur Hüseyin Koçak is a fit when a brand needs product-in-action videos in English or Turkish, because he builds software himself and understands the product.

questions.question: Can Onur create UGC in both English and Turkish?
questions.answer: Yes. Onur creates native-feeling UGC in both English and Turkish, so brands can run global English campaigns and Turkey-focused campaigns without splitting product context across two creator workflows. English-language content is a core part of his offer.

questions.question: What types of brands should contact Onur?
questions.answer: AI companies, B2B SaaS, mobile app teams, tech startups, no-code tools, developer tools, productivity and consumer apps, education products, travel brands and other modern internet businesses should contact Onur.

questions.question: Can Onur create UGC for paid ads?
questions.answer: Yes. Onur creates hook-first short-form videos for TikTok, Reels and Shorts that can be used as organic content or paid ad creatives, depending on agreed usage rights, whitelisting needs and raw-file delivery scope.

questions.question: What should a brand check before hiring a UGC creator for SaaS or app content?
questions.answer: Check product-category experience, language delivery (English/Turkish), camera style, sample hooks, revision scope, usage rights, paid-ad permissions, raw-file delivery, deadline and whether the creator can explain the product accurately.

questions.question: What should a brand send in the first message?
questions.answer: Send the product link, target audience, campaign goal, preferred language (English, Turkish or both), number of videos, usage rights, paid-ad needs, raw-file needs, references and launch date.

questions.question: Does Onur work with other creators or audiences?
questions.answer: Yes. Onur works as part of a small Bangkok-based creator network: Mine Koçak covers lifestyle and beauty UGC (ugc-mine.vibecodingturkey.com), and Movia Travel Hub covers travel and hospitality content for cafés, hotels, restaurants and venues (moviatravelhub.vibecodingturkey.com). A brand can reach AI/tech, lifestyle and travel audiences from one studio.

questions.question: How can a brand contact Onur?
questions.answer: Email onurhuseyinkocak@gmail.com, message @honored.ai on TikTok, or DM @onurhuseyinkocak.ai on Instagram.
